## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Emily LeGrand for the Client Operations Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Need:** Andi (Head of Customer Ops) needs a strategic partner to build scalable systems for GrowthX, a new agency, while she focuses on day-to-day delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**The Candidate:** Emily has 7 years of strategic ops experience at Accenture and Rapid7, including building a customer health system from scratch to address a declining renewal rate.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**The Fit:** Emily is actively seeking a hyper-growth environment ("operating in the gray") and has direct experience with GrowthX's immediate priorities: defining health metrics, standardizing contracts, and evaluating project management tools.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

## Topics

### The Need at GrowthX

  - [**Context:** GrowthX is a new (1-year-old) agency with \~50 clients, now facing its first renewal cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Problem:** Andi is "in the weeds" managing the delivery team (Account Directors) and needs a strategic partner to build scalable systems.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Immediate Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Define and track client health metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [Standardize contracts (convert 3-month rolling to annual).](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
      - [Evaluate project management tools (e.g., Linear, Monday, Vitally) for capacity planning.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Support a reorg to create dedicated CS roles.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)

### Emily's Experience & Approach

  - [**Background:** 7 years in strategic program management at Accenture Federal and Rapid7.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Seeking a hyper-growth environment for more autonomy and impact, as Rapid7's pace and culture are not a long-term fit.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Relevant Projects:**](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [**Customer Health System (Rapid7):** Built a unified view of health indicators to predict risk and improve renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
          - [**Indicators:** Product adoption, operational engagement (incidents), NPS/CSAT trends, and a human "advisor assessment."](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**Prioritization Framework (Rapid7):** Created an intake/execution process using Slack-to-Jira workflows to manage a high volume of stakeholder requests.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Cross-Functional Advocacy (Accenture):** As interim Product Owner, translated customer pain points (e.g., file size limits) into prioritized requirements for developers by leading with the "why" and business impact.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

### GrowthX's Current State & Culture

  - [**Business Model:** Services agency built on an internal platform, with a product-led future planned for 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [**Contracts:** Converting legacy 3-month rolling contracts (avg. $8k/mo) to annual terms (avg. $15k/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [**Health Metrics:** Current tracking is subjective (e.g., quality audits). The goal is to build objective, ongoing dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [**Culture:** Andi joined for the freedom to experiment and the team's shared startup experience. The company is profitable and funding its own growth.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
      - [Message Bridget to schedule a follow-up interview with Emily.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
      - [Await contact from Bridget to schedule the next interview.](https://fathom.video/share/tT_3KGjULotoprm3G4qomWshA-MDc8SJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
